name: joyyyced--auto-model-router
description: Automatically select and use the best AI model for any task based on task type. ALWAYS activate this skill at the start of a new task or when the user asks a substantive question. Routes coding tasks to code-specialized models, math to reasoning models, translation to multilingual models, casual chat to fast cheap models, etc. Learns from user feedback over time when router is configured. Trigger phrases: "help me", "write", "code", "debug", "translate", "analyze", "summarize", "explain", or any task-oriented request.
